mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_BASIC WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
AND ${search_type} like '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_ANSWER_USER WHERE survey_idx = #{survey_idx} AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_BASIC WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND survey_private_yn = 'Y'
AND ${search_type} like '%' || #{search_text} || '%'

SELECT survey_idx, survey_title, survey_content, survey_start_date, survey_end_date, survey_start_time, survey_end_time, CASE WHEN SURVEY_OPEN_YN = 'N' THEN 'N' WHEN SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(survey_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(survey_end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END survey_open_yn, survey_private_yn, annyms_yn, limit_user_yn, limit_user_id, add_date, add_user_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_ANSWER_USER b WHERE a.survey_idx = b.survey_idx and a.homepage_id = b.homepage_id) AS answer_count, add_user_tel, skin_cd, open_yn, name_yn, greetings, popup_yn, select_cnt FROM CMS_SURVEY_BASIC a WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ORDER BY
survey_idx DESC

SELECT homepage_id, survey_idx, survey_title, survey_content, survey_start_date, survey_end_date, survey_start_time, survey_end_time, CASE WHEN SURVEY_OPEN_YN = 'N' THEN 'N' WHEN SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(survey_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(survey_end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END survey_open_yn, survey_open_yn, survey_private_yn, annyms_yn, limit_user_yn, limit_user_id, add_date, add_user_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_ANSWER_USER b WHERE a.survey_idx = b.survey_idx and a.homepage_id = b.homepage_id) AS answer_count,
add_user_id AS add_user_name, a.add_user_tel, skin_cd, open_yn, name_yn, greetings, popup_yn, select_cnt FROM CMS_SURVEY_BASIC a WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND survey_idx = #{survey_idx}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(survey_idx),0)+1 FROM CMS_SURVEY_BASIC
INSERT INTO CMS_SURVEY_BASIC ( homepage_id, survey_idx, survey_title, survey_content, survey_start_date, survey_end_date, survey_start_time, survey_end_time, survey_open_yn, limit_user_yn, limit_user_id, add_date, add_user_id, add_user_tel, skin_cd, annyms_yn, modify_date, modify_user_id, open_yn, name_yn, greetings, popup_yn, survey_private_yn ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{survey_idx}, #{survey_title}, #{survey_content}, #{survey_start_date}, #{survey_end_date}, #{survey_start_time}, #{survey_end_time}, #{survey_open_yn}, #{limit_user_yn}, #{limit_user_id}, SYSDATE, #{add_user_id}, #{add_user_tel}, #{skin_cd}, #{annyms_yn}, SYSDATE, #{add_user_id}, #{open_yn}, #{name_yn}, #{greetings}, #{popup_yn}, #{survey_private_yn} )
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_SURVEY_BASIC SET survey_title = #{survey_title}, survey_content = #{survey_content}, survey_start_date = #{survey_start_date}, survey_end_date = #{survey_end_date}, survey_start_time = #{survey_start_time}, survey_end_time = #{survey_end_time}, survey_open_yn = #{survey_open_yn}, limit_user_yn = #{limit_user_yn}, limit_user_id = #{limit_user_id}, add_user_tel = #{add_user_tel}, skin_cd = #{skin_cd}, modify_date = SYSDATE, modify_user_id = #{modify_user_id}, open_yn = #{open_yn}, name_yn = #{name_yn}, greetings = #{greetings}, popup_yn = #{popup_yn}, survey_private_yn = #{survey_private_yn}, annyms_yn = #{annyms_yn} WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND survey_idx = #{survey_idx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CMS_SURVEY_BASIC ( HOMEPAGE_ID, SURVEY_IDX, SURVEY_TITLE, SURVEY_CONTENT, SURVEY_START_DATE, SURVEY_END_DATE, SURVEY_START_TIME, SURVEY_END_TIME, SURVEY_OPEN_YN, LIMIT_USER_YN, LIMIT_USER_ID, ADD_DATE, ADD_USER_ID, ADD_USER_TEL, SKIN_CD, ANNYMS_YN, MODIFY_DATE, MODIFY_USER_ID, OPEN_YN, NAME_YN, GREETINGS, POPUP_YN, SURVEY_PRIVATE_YN ) SELECT #{homepage_id}, (SELECT NVL(MAX(survey_idx),0)+1 FROM CMS_SURVEY_BASIC), SURVEY_TITLE || '_복사본', SURVEY_CONTENT, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24:MI'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24:MI'), 'Y', LIMIT_USER_YN, LIMIT_USER_ID, SYSDATE, #{add_user_id}, ADD_USER_TEL, SKIN_CD, ANNYMS_YN, SYSDATE, #{add_user_id}, OPEN_YN, NAME_YN, GREETINGS, POPUP_YN, 'N' FROM CMS_SURVEY_BASIC WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND survey_idx = #{survey_idx}

INSERT INTO CMS_SURVEY_QUEST ( HOMEPAGE_ID, SURVEY_IDX, QUEST_IDX, QUEST_TYPE, QUEST_CONTENT, QUEST_AUTH, QUEST_COUNT, QUEST_ORDER, QUEST_DETAIL_FREE_YN, MATRIX_COUNT, ADD_DATE, ADD_USER_ID, REQUIRED_YN, MODIFY_DATE, MODIFY_USER_ID ) SELECT #{homepage_id}, (SELECT MAX(survey_idx) FROM CMS_SURVEY_BASIC WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}), QUEST_IDX, QUEST_TYPE, QUEST_CONTENT, QUEST_AUTH, QUEST_COUNT, QUEST_ORDER, QUEST_DETAIL_FREE_YN, MATRIX_COUNT, SYSDATE, #{add_user_id}, REQUIRED_YN, SYSDATE, #{add_user_id} FROM CMS_SURVEY_QUEST WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND survey_idx = #{survey_idx}

INSERT INTO CMS_SURVEY_QUEST_DETAIL ( HOMEPAGE_ID, SURVEY_IDX, QUEST_IDX, QUEST_DETAIL_IDX, QUEST_DETAIL_ORDER, QUEST_DETAIL_TITLE, ADD_DATE, ADD_USER_ID, BRANCH_IDX, MODIFY_DATE, MODIFY_USER_ID ) SELECT #{homepage_id}, (SELECT MAX(survey_idx) FROM CMS_SURVEY_BASIC WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}), QUEST_IDX, QUEST_DETAIL_IDX, QUEST_DETAIL_ORDER, QUEST_DETAIL_TITLE, SYSDATE, #{add_user_id}, BRANCH_IDX, SYSDATE, #{add_user_id} FROM CMS_SURVEY_QUEST_DETAIL WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND survey_idx = #{survey_idx}
